# MuleSoft Adobe Marketo Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.0) of Adobe Marketo Connector documentation.
> See [Adobe Marketo Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/marketo-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Adobe Marketo Connector documentation in one file.

- [Adobe Marketo Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/marketo-connector/latest/index.md)
